name: MuscleBlaze MB-Vite Daily Multivitamin 60 Tablets
description: MB-Vite is a comprehensive daily multivitamin packed with 43 vital nutrients including Vitamin C, D3, B-complex, Zinc, and a herbal blend with Ginseng and Ashwagandha. Designed for active Indian men and women, it supports immunity, energy metabolism, and post-workout recovery. Ideal for gym-goers seeking daily micronutrient support.

name: GNC Mega Men Sport Multivitamin 90 Tablets
description: GNC Mega Men Sport is a performance-focused multivitamin formulated for athletes and serious gym-goers, delivering high-potency B vitamins, antioxidants, and amino acids for muscle function and recovery. Contains Vitamin D3, Zinc, and BCAAs to support testosterone levels, endurance, and immune health. A trusted choice for men pursuing peak training performance.

name: Optimum Nutrition Opti-Men Multivitamin 90 Tablets
description: Opti-Men by Optimum Nutrition delivers over 75 active ingredients including 25+ vitamins and minerals, an amino acid blend, and phyto-nutrients tailored for active men. Supports immune function, energy production, and muscle performance with Vitamin E, D, and a free-form amino blend. A globally trusted multivitamin for dedicated fitness enthusiasts.
